meta.title: AI Dev 25 | Paige Bailey: A Beginner's Guide to Multimodal AI with Gemini 2 Veo 2 and Imagen 3
meta.description:
In this hands-on workshop at AI Dev 25, Paige Bailey, AI Developer Relations Lead at Google DeepMind, introduces developers to the powerful multimodal capabilities of Gemini 2.0, Veo 2, and Imagen 3, all accessible through AI Studio.

This session walks through how to:

– Use Gemini 2.0 APIs for a variety of tasks
– Generate video content with Veo 2
– Create high-quality images using Imagen 3
– Get started with Gemini 2.0’s live multimodal streaming API

Whether you're new to AI or looking to expand your toolkit, this session offers a practical entry point into building with cutting-edge multimodal tools.

Keep building,
DeepLearning.AI
